attributes.title: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Database Performance
attributes.description: Deep-dive into Redis Enterprise database performance: latency breakdown, throughput, memory utilisation, cache effectiveness, and connection patterns.

params.markdown:
## [Redis Enterprise OTel] Database Performance

Per-database performance analysis for Redis Enterprise:
- Read, write, and other command latency trends
- Operations throughput and network bandwidth
- Memory usage vs configured limits
- Cache hit/miss ratios and eviction rates
- Active and new connection patterns
- Keyspace size and expiry tracking

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS bdb_status = MAX(bdb_up) BY bdb
| STATS databases_up = SUM(bdb_status)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS bdb_status = MAX(bdb_up) BY bdb
| STATS databases_up = SUM(bdb_status)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_latency)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = avg_latency * 1000

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_latency)
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = avg_latency * 1000

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ops = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY bdb
| STATS total_ops = SUM(avg_ops)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ops = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec) BY bdb
| STATS total_ops = SUM(avg_ops)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_hits IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = SUM(bdb_read_hits), misses = SUM(bdb_read_misses)
| EVAL hit_rate = ROUND((hits / (hits + misses)) * 100, 1)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_hits IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = SUM(bdb_read_hits), misses = SUM(bdb_read_misses)
| EVAL hit_rate = ROUND((hits / (hits + misses)) * 100, 1)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem = AVG(bdb_used_memory) BY bdb
| STATS total_memory = SUM(avg_mem)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_mem = AVG(bdb_used_memory) BY bdb
| STATS total_memory = SUM(avg_mem)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_limit = AVG(bdb_memory_limit) BY bdb
| STATS total_limit = SUM(avg_limit)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_limit = AVG(bdb_memory_limit) BY bdb
| STATS total_limit = SUM(avg_limit)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_conns = AVG(bdb_conns) BY bdb
| STATS total_conns = SUM(avg_conns)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_conns = AVG(bdb_conns) BY bdb
| STATS total_conns = SUM(avg_conns)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_evicted_objects IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_evictions = SUM(bdb_evicted_objects)

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_evicted_objects IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_evictions = SUM(bdb_evicted_objects)

attributes.title: Read / Write / Other Latency Over Time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_read_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS read_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_read_latency), write_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_write_latency), other_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_other_latency) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_read_latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS read_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_read_latency), write_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_write_latency), other_latency = AVG(bdb_avg_other_latency) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency_max IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_read = MAX(bdb_avg_read_latency_max), max_write = MAX(bdb_avg_write_latency_max), max_other = MAX(bdb_avg_other_latency_max) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_avg_latency_max IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_read = MAX(bdb_avg_read_latency_max), max_write = MAX(bdb_avg_write_latency_max), max_other = MAX(bdb_avg_other_latency_max) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Request Rate by Type Over Time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS read_req = AVG(bdb_read_req), write_req = AVG(bdb_write_req), other_req = AVG(bdb_other_req) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_req IS NOT NULL
| STATS read_req = AVG(bdb_read_req), write_req = AVG(bdb_write_req), other_req = AVG(bdb_other_req) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_ingress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS ingress = AVG(bdb_ingress_bytes), egress = AVG(bdb_egress_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_ingress_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS ingress = AVG(bdb_ingress_bytes), egress = AVG(bdb_egress_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Memory Usage Over Time by Database

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS used_memory = AVG(bdb_used_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_used_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS used_memory = AVG(bdb_used_memory) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_mem_frag_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag_ratio = AVG(bdb_mem_frag_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_mem_frag_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag_ratio = AVG(bdb_mem_frag_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_hits IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = SUM(bdb_read_hits), misses = SUM(bdb_read_misses) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL hit_rate = ROUND((hits / (hits + misses)) * 100, 2)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_read_hits IS NOT NULL
| STATS hits = SUM(bdb_read_hits), misses = SUM(bdb_read_misses) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL hit_rate = ROUND((hits / (hits + misses)) * 100, 2)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_evicted_objects IS NOT NULL
| STATS evictions = AVG(bdb_evicted_objects), expirations = AVG(bdb_expired_objects) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_evicted_objects IS NOT NULL
| STATS evictions = AVG(bdb_evicted_objects), expirations = AVG(bdb_expired_objects) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_no_of_keys IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_keys = SUM(bdb_no_of_keys), keys_with_expiry = SUM(bdb_no_of_expires) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_no_of_keys IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_keys = SUM(bdb_no_of_keys), keys_with_expiry = SUM(bdb_no_of_expires) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Active Connections Over Time by Database

query.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_conns = AVG(bdb_conns) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_conns IS NOT NULL
| STATS active_conns = AVG(bdb_conns) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_shard_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| EVAL shard_cpu = bdb_shard_cpu_user + bdb_shard_cpu_system
| STATS cpu = AVG(shard_cpu) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_shard_cpu_user IS NOT NULL
| EVAL shard_cpu = bdb_shard_cpu_user + bdb_shard_cpu_system
| STATS cpu = AVG(shard_cpu) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), bdb
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS Status = MAX(bdb_up), `Latency (s)` = AVG(bdb_avg_latency), `Read Latency` = AVG(bdb_avg_read_latency), `Write Latency` = AVG(bdb_avg_write_latency), `Ops/sec` = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec), `Used Memory` = AVG(bdb_used_memory), `Memory Limit` = AVG(bdb_memory_limit), `Frag Ratio` = AVG(bdb_mem_frag_ratio), `Hit Rate Hits` = SUM(bdb_read_hits), `Hit Rate Misses` = SUM(bdb_read_misses), Connections = AVG(bdb_conns), Keys = AVG(bdb_no_of_keys), Evictions = SUM(bdb_evicted_objects) BY bdb
| EVAL `Memory %` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Used Memory` / `Memory Limit`) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL `Hit Rate` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Hit Rate Hits` / (`Hit Rate Hits` + `Hit Rate Misses`)) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `Latency (s)` = COALESCE(`Latency (s)`, 0.0), `Read Latency` = COALESCE(`Read Latency`, 0.0), `Write Latency` = COALESCE(`Write Latency`, 0.0), `Ops/sec` = COALESCE(`Ops/sec`, 0.0), `Used Memory` = COALESCE(`Used Memory`, 0), `Memory Limit` = COALESCE(`Memory Limit`, 0), `Frag Ratio` = COALESCE(`Frag Ratio`, 0.0), `Hit Rate Hits` = COALESCE(`Hit Rate Hits`, 0), `Hit Rate Misses` = COALESCE(`Hit Rate Misses`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), Keys = COALESCE(Keys, 0), Evictions = COALESCE(Evictions, 0)
| SORT bdb ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE bdb_up IS NOT NULL
| STATS Status = MAX(bdb_up), `Latency (s)` = AVG(bdb_avg_latency), `Read Latency` = AVG(bdb_avg_read_latency), `Write Latency` = AVG(bdb_avg_write_latency), `Ops/sec` = AVG(bdb_instantaneous_ops_per_sec), `Used Memory` = AVG(bdb_used_memory), `Memory Limit` = AVG(bdb_memory_limit), `Frag Ratio` = AVG(bdb_mem_frag_ratio), `Hit Rate Hits` = SUM(bdb_read_hits), `Hit Rate Misses` = SUM(bdb_read_misses), Connections = AVG(bdb_conns), Keys = AVG(bdb_no_of_keys), Evictions = SUM(bdb_evicted_objects) BY bdb
| EVAL `Memory %` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Used Memory` / `Memory Limit`) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL `Hit Rate` = COALESCE(ROUND((`Hit Rate Hits` / (`Hit Rate Hits` + `Hit Rate Misses`)) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| EVAL Status = COALESCE(Status, 0), `Latency (s)` = COALESCE(`Latency (s)`, 0.0), `Read Latency` = COALESCE(`Read Latency`, 0.0), `Write Latency` = COALESCE(`Write Latency`, 0.0), `Ops/sec` = COALESCE(`Ops/sec`, 0.0), `Used Memory` = COALESCE(`Used Memory`, 0), `Memory Limit` = COALESCE(`Memory Limit`, 0), `Frag Ratio` = COALESCE(`Frag Ratio`, 0.0), `Hit Rate Hits` = COALESCE(`Hit Rate Hits`, 0), `Hit Rate Misses` = COALESCE(`Hit Rate Misses`, 0), Connections = COALESCE(Connections, 0), Keys = COALESCE(Keys, 0), Evictions = COALESCE(Evictions, 0)
| SORT bdb ASC
| LIMIT 100
